title: tk create/update --target-date flag
description:
Add --target-date <ISO-day> to tk create and tk update; parse/validate as a precise day. Design §9 surface.

Files: cmd/tk/cmd/create.go, cmd/tk/cmd/update.go.
acceptance_criteria: tk create --target-date and tk update --target-date set the field; invalid/non-ISO date rejected with a clear error; cmd tests pass
closed_reason: Completed: --target-date flag on tk create/update with ISO-day validation; empty string clears, per existing convention
